overall.description: First-person exploration of a rustic log cabin interior in a video game. The player character moves through candlelit wooden rooms including bedrooms and a main hall with a stone fireplace, featuring detailed timber construction, hunting trophies, and period furniture.

approaching and opening wooden door at top of stairs

wooden staircase with log railings leading upward

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a small entry room with a circular woven rug and wall-mounted candelabra. The camera ascends a wooden staircase with log railings, transitioning to an upper corridor with wooden paneling and an antler chandelier, ending at a closed wooden door.

scene_state.functional_zone: cabin bedroom with green bedding and dining area

events.description: approaching wooden table with food items and lit candle

agents.ego_description: exploring the bedroom, examining the green bed, wall-mounted hunting trophies, and table with bread and cheese

entered.detail: wooden bed frame with green blanket and white pillows
taxidermy bison head mounted on log wall
round wooden table with food items including bread and cheese
taxidermy deer head with antlers mounted on wall

segments.scene_description: Inside the first bedroom, the camera explores a cozy space with a green bed, wooden nightstand, and mounted bison head. The player approaches a dining table set with bread, cheese, and a lit candle, passing wooden chairs and a mounted deer head before heading toward the exit door.

scene_state.functional_zone: second cabin bedroom with red bedding

events.description: exiting first bedroom and entering corridor
opening door and entering second bedroom

agents.ego_description: moving through wooden corridor and entering second bedroom with red bed and animal pelt rug

white fur rug on floor beside bed
tall wooden cabinet with double doors

segments.scene_description: The player exits the first bedroom into a narrow corridor, then opens a door to a second bedroom featuring a bed with red bedding, a white animal pelt rug, wooden wardrobe, and a desk with an oil lamp. The room has log walls with a mounted deer head.

scene_state.functional_zone: main hall with stone fireplace and four-poster bed

events.description: entering spacious main hall from bedroom
approaching and focusing on lit stone fireplace

agents.ego_description: exploring the main hall, approaching the fireplace and examining the four-poster bed and seating area

entered.detail: large four-poster bed with red curtains and carved wooden posts
stone hearth with active fire and wooden mantel
taxidermy deer head mounted above stone fireplace
chandelier made of antlers hanging from ceiling

segments.scene_description: The player enters a spacious main hall featuring a grand four-poster bed with red curtains and a large stone fireplace with an active fire. The camera explores the room, passing wooden armchairs and a bench, focusing on the fireplace with a mounted deer head above it and an antler chandelier overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rustic log cabin, moving from a modest entryway through private bedrooms and finally into a grand main hall. It begins in a small entry room with a woven rug and wall-mounted candelabra before ascending a wooden staircase into an upper corridor adorned with an antler chandelier. As the camera passes through a closed door, the scene shifts into a cozy bedroom featuring a green bed and a mounted bison head, moving past a dining table set with bread and cheese toward the exit. The movement then flows through a narrow corridor and into a second bedroom with red bedding and a white animal pelt rug before opening into the spacious main hall. Finally, the environment expands to reveal a grand four-poster bed and a large stone fireplace with an active fire, centered under a final antler chandelier.
